data.body: The terminal-manager dispatch wrapper at terminal-manager.ts:653-654 always says 'Implement the following task. You MUST edit the actual source files' regardless of workflow step. For review steps like implementation_review, this actively contradicts the read-only constraints in the kno skill prompt. The wrapper should vary by workflow step — review steps should instruct the agent to review, not implement. Additionally, if kno claim returns a non-zero exit code, the agent should simply exit rather than proceeding without constraints.
data.title: Terminal-manager wrapper prompt is unconditionally implementation-biased
